body_excerpt: In handle_ramdump of pixel_loader.c, there is a possible way to create a ramdump of non-secure memory due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In handle_ramdump of pixel_loader.c, there is a possible way to create a ramdump of non-secure memory due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local information disclosure with System exe
